# Brand Framework — Quote Followup Gap Audit

## Campaign Name
Quote Followup - Execution Gap

## Product
Quote-to-Cash Optimization Platform

## Offer
Free 15-Minute Quote Followup Gap Audit

## Core Message
Most revenue leakage happens AFTER the quote — not before it. Sales teams are great at quoting, terrible at following up. We map the exact gap.

## Tone
Direct, data-driven, consultative. No fluff. No false urgency.

## Claims
- Most quotes never get followed up (industry surveys)
- 15-minute audit reveals your follow-up gap (internal methodology)  
- Companies miss 47% of quote follow-ups (Forrester research)
